Override.entitydescription.faradayartifact: A mysterious artifact found in an alien ruin. Even through thick insulation, it makes your arm hairs stand on end...
Override.entitydescription.nasonovartifact: A mysterious artifact found in an alien ruin. It cries out, and the ocean bends to its will...
Override.entitydescription.psychosisartifact: A mysterious artifact found in an alien ruin. Its inscryptions offer limitless potential, if you're willing to take the leap...
Override.entitydescription.skyholderartifact: A mysterious artifact found in an alien ruin. Even in the water, it makes you feel uncomfortably dry...
Override.entitydescription.thermalartifact: A mysterious artifact found in an alien ruin. The sea around it shimmers with a dormant, smoldering rage...
Override.entitydescription.alientrinket1: A minor artifact found in an alien ruin. It somehow always emerges from water completely dry.
Override.entitydescription.alientrinket2: A minor artifact found in an alien ruin. The surface irritates your skin after some time.
Override.entitydescription.alientrinket3: A minor artifact found in an alien ruin. Despite its apparent age, it seems nigh-indestructible.
Override.entitydescription.oxygeniteshard: A rare, porous alien mineral that seems to be perpetually encased in air. Used in advanced breathing aids.
Override.entitydescription.sulphuriteshard: A rare alien mineral, unnaturally rough and dangerously corrosive. Used to create permanent enhancement drugs.
